title: Modes, Padding, Malleability, and Legacy Decryption
description: A database encrypts records with ECB, a migration endpoint exposes CBC padding failures, and a CTR counter can repeat after restoring a snapshot. Learners cumulatively produce mode failure laboratory and migration adapter through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Demonstrate deterministic block-pattern leakage and prohibit ECB for application messages.
Trace CBC chaining, IV requirements, padding validation, malleability, and oracle behavior as a legacy risk.
Trace CTR keystream generation and prove that key-counter reuse destroys confidentiality and enables malleation.
